inventory_gaps.combat_filter_parameters: combat_center_alpha, combat_edge_alpha, combat_same_slew, and combat_reverse_slew are model/UI metadata fields but are not applied by the current runtime stack.
inventory_gaps.hat_button_mapping: HatMapping button fields exist, but runtime output intent currently emits POV1 state rather than translating hat directions to output buttons.
inventory_gaps.vjoy_readback: No vJoy readback channel exists; accepted write calls are not readback proof.
